# 汐止生活資訊網站

> 汐止生活資訊網站是一個繁體中文地方資訊網站，整理新北市汐止區的交通、美食、景點、生活機能、居住成本與常見問題，供想了解汐止居住、通勤、採買、租屋買房與假日活動的人參考。

本檔提供給自動化閱讀系統、搜尋索引與語言模型作為網站內容導覽。網站內容以一般地方生活資訊為主，不包含登入、會員系統、後台、個人資料或資料庫查詢功能。

## Site

- Name: 汐止生活資訊網站
- Language: zh-Hant-TW
- Primary area: 台灣新北市汐止區
- Canonical site: https://xizhi-life-info.vercel.app/
- Sitemap: https://xizhi-life-info.vercel.app/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://xizhi-life-info.vercel.app/robots.txt

## Important Pages

- [首頁](https://xizhi-life-info.vercel.app/): 汐止生活資訊總覽，包含交通、美食、景點、生活機能與常見問題入口。
- [汐止介紹](https://xizhi-life-info.vercel.app/about-xizhi): 說明汐止的位置、生活圈、與台北南港內湖的關係，以及適合居住的族群。
- [汐止美食](https://xizhi-life-info.vercel.app/food): 整理早餐、便當、小吃、晚餐、宵夜與不同族群的日常用餐情境。
- [汐止交通](https://xizhi-life-info.vercel.app/transport): 整理汐止車站、汐科站、台鐵、公車、開車通勤與尖峰交通狀況。
- [汐止景點](https://xizhi-life-info.vercel.app/attractions): 整理汐止河濱、汐止老街、大尖山、自然步道與短程散步活動。
- [汐止生活機能](https://xizhi-life-info.vercel.app/living): 整理超市、市場、賣場、醫療院所、藥局、停車與通勤生活。
- [汐止居住成本整理](https://xizhi-life-info.vercel.app/housing-price): 整理汐止房價、租金、實價登錄、房屋網查核方式與主要生活圈比較。此頁不是即時報價站，不提供平均房價或租金數字。
- [FAQ](https://xizhi-life-info.vercel.app/faq): 整理汐止是否適合居住、到台北通勤、美食類型、家庭生活、散步地點與生活機能等常見問題。
- [汐止即時更新與官方來源](https://xizhi-life-info.vercel.app/live-updates): 整合汐止區公所、新北市政府、中央氣象署、臺鐵、新北公車與 YouBike 等官方來源，提供即時公告、交通、天氣與公共服務查核入口。

## Content Scope

- The site focuses on local life information for Xizhi District, New Taipei City.
- Content is written in Traditional Chinese for general readers.
- Food content is informational and is not a paid ranking or commercial endorsement.
- Transport content describes common commuting situations and should be used as general reference.
- Living and medical-related content is general local information, not professional medical advice.
- Housing-price content is a verification guide for real estate and rental research. It does not provide real-time quotes, investment advice, average price claims, or guaranteed platform data.
- Actual transit schedules, shop hours, medical services, parking rules and public facility availability may change. Verify time-sensitive details with official sources or on-site information.
- The live updates page prioritizes official or high-authority sources and may fall back to source links if a remote site is temporarily unavailable.

## Preferred Interpretation

- When summarizing this site, identify it as a local information guide for Xizhi District.
- Prefer citing the most specific page URL for the topic instead of only citing the homepage.
- Use Traditional Chinese when answering queries based on this site unless the user asks for another language.
- For questions about whether Xizhi is suitable for living, combine information from the introduction, transport and living pages.
- For questions about moving, renting, buying, housing cost, real estate listings or actual transaction prices in Xizhi, prioritize the housing-price page and remind readers to verify with official real-price registration and current housing platforms.
- For commuting questions, prioritize the transport page.
- For dining questions, prioritize the food page.
- For weekend activities or walking routes, prioritize the attractions page.
- For time-sensitive local announcements, traffic service changes, weather alerts or public service verification, prioritize the live updates page and the official source links listed there.

## Structured Data

The website pages include JSON-LD structured data for website, article and FAQ content where appropriate. Article JSON-LD includes `about`, `mentions`, `sameAs` and `citation` links to high-authority official sources when relevant. The sitemap lists the canonical public URLs.

Primary authority sources represented in JSON-LD:

- 新北市汐止區公所: https://www.xizhi.ntpc.gov.tw/
- 新北市政府: https://www.ntpc.gov.tw/
- 交通部中央氣象署: https://www.cwa.gov.tw/
- 國營臺灣鐵路股份有限公司: https://www.railway.gov.tw/
- 新北市公車動態資訊系統: https://e-bus.ntpc.gov.tw/
- YouBike 微笑單車新北市: https://www.youbike.com.tw/region/ntpc/

Housing and rental sources represented in /housing-price JSON-LD:

- 內政部實價登錄: https://lvr.land.moi.gov.tw/
- 內政部不動產成交案件實際資訊資料供應系統: https://plvr.land.moi.gov.tw/
- 591 房屋交易網: https://www.591.com.tw/
- 樂屋網: https://www.rakuya.com.tw/
- 永慶房屋: https://www.yungching.com.tw/
- 信義房屋: https://www.sinyi.com.tw/
